evidence.source_title: In All But Name: The Iranian Regime's (De Facto) Lobby in the West
evidence.description: Hoover Institution report by Abbas Milani places Parsi and NIAC as the 'diaspora pillar' of Tehran's influence network, alongside IEI members. Not directly named in the leaked emails themselves.

editorial_notes: Parsi is not in the IEI emails directly but is placed in the same network by credible academic analysis.
